transcript.content: We are evaluating project management tools for 200 seats. What is your pricing?
$29.99 per seat per month for annual contract. 99.9% uptime SLA included.
That works within our $75,000 annual budget. Do you offer SSO integration?
Yes, SSO is included at no extra cost. We also provide 24/7 support.
We accept. Please send the contract.
